name: Magic World
text: You may use <Magic World> and <Generic> cards.
flavor: Dancin' demons, it's time to defeat!

name: Gunrod, Bechstein
text:
[Equip Cost] Pay 1 gauge.

[Act] You may [Rest] this card. If you do, deal 1 damage to your opponent.

name: Gunrod, Del Gesu
text:
[Equip Cost] [Pay 1 gauge]

[Act] You may [Rest] this card. If you do, deal 1 damage to your opponent!

When this card attacks your opponent, you may put one of your monster from the field into the drop zone. If you do, for this turn, add to this card the critical of the monster put into drop zone with this ability.

name: Gunrod, Martil
text: [Act] �Ether Boost� You may [Rest] this card. If you do, for this turn, a monster on your field gets power+3000!

[Equip Cost] Pay 2 gauge.

name: Magic Arm, Burning Fist
text:
[Equip Cost] [Pay 1 life].

text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

You may only cast this card when your opponent cast a spell.

[Counter] Nullify the spell cast by your opponent. (The nullified card does not enter the field, effects from the card do not resolve, and the card goes to the drop zone.)

name: Bastin Caps

[Cast Cost] Pay 4 gauge.

[Cast Cost] Pay 2 gauge.

[Act] You may only cast this card when an opponent calls a size 2 or less monster.

[Counter] Nullify the call. (The nullified card does not enter the field, effects from the card do not resolve, and the card goes to the drop zone.)

This'll knock your socks off!
That means, don't come any closer!

name: Bestie!
text: [Counter] You may reveal a �72 Pillars� from your hand. If you do, choose a �72 Pillars� on your field in battle, and for this battle, add to that card the power and defense of the revealed card, and [Counterattack].

name: Bye Bye Later!
text: Put a size 2 or less monster from the field to the gauge. (Your opponent's monster is put into his or her gauge, and your monster is put into your gauge!)

text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

[Counter] Return all monsters on your field to your hand. Then, you may call a monster from your hand to your center by paying its [Call Cost]. You may only cast �Chech It Out!� once per turn.

[Cast Cost] Pay 1 gauge.

Choose two �72 Pillars� from your drop zone with the same card name, and put them into your hand. (If there are no cards with the same name, then you do not put any cards into your hand.)

text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

You may only cast this if you have six or more �Wizard� in your drop zone.

text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 4 gauge & Pay 1 life]

Return all size 2 or less monsters on the field to hand, put the five cards from the top of your deck into the drop zone. Call up to three �72 Pillars� monsters from among them by paying its [Call Cost].

name: Great Spell, My Grandfather Clock
text:
[Cast Cost] Pay 2 gauge.

You may only cast this card if you have six or more different �Wizard� in the drop zone.

Return all cards from your drop zone to your deck, and shuffle your deck. After this turn, you get another turn!

text:
[Cast Cost] Pay 2 gauge. & pay 1 life.

[Counter] Choose up to three size 1 �72 Pillars� from your drop zone, and call them without paying the [Call Cost]. Return all cards from your drop zone to your deck, and shuffle your deck.

[Cast Cost] Pay 1 gauge.

Move a size 2 or less monster in your opponent's center to the open left or right!

name: Key of Solomon, Second Volume
text: You gain 1 life. If you have "Key of Solomon, First Volume" in your drop zone, draw a card.
flavor: The second volume states the way to order the 72 Pillars. It's best to go with the local slangs again. 'Listen up or your head will get bashed in!'

name: Kosher
text:
You may only cast this card if you have two or more �Wizard� monsters on the field.

Put the top card of your deck into the gauge, and draw a card. You may only cast "Kosher" once per turn.

text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 1 gauge]

[Equip Cost] [Pay 1 gauge]

text:
You may only equip this card when you have 5 life or less.

text:
[Equip Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

[Double Attack]

text:
You may only cast this card during an attack on your opponent's turn, and if you have no monsters on your center.

text:
[Set] (This card remains on the field)

text:
[Cast Cost] Pay 1 gauge.

Destroy all monsters on your opponent's field! For the rest of the turn, your monster cannot attack.

text:
You may only cast this card if you do not have a monster on your center.

name: Dragoenergy
text:
You may cast any number of "Dragoenergy" at the same time.

[Counter] Choose an «Armordragon» in battle, and for this battle, give it power+3000, defense+3000, and [Counterattack]. ([Counterattack]: If this monster is still on the field after an attack, choose a monster that attacked with defense less than or equal to this monster's power, and destroy it.)
flavor: Advice! Use this when your monster is under attack during your opponent's turn!

name: Dragogenius
text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

You may only cast this card if you have 5 life or less.

Draw two cards. "Dragogenius" may only be cast once per turn.
flavor: Different logic, different cultures. Overcome that, and new ideas shall spring forth.

name: Dragospeed
text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

Choose one of your size 2 or less «Armordragon» on the field, and for this turn, it can attack your opponent even if your opponent has a monster in the center.
flavor: There are no frontlines for an Armordragon.

name: Dragon Barrier
text:
[Counter] For this turn, the next time a size 2 or greater monster on your field would be destroyed, it remains on the field.

(Advice: You can counter with this card after you know it's going to be destroyed! So stay calm and counter!)
flavor: Don't want to die? Then it's gotta be barrier.

name: Dragon Breath
text:
[Cast Cost] Pay 1 gauge.

[Counter] Destroy a monster on the field with 4000 or less power!
flavor: Don't panic! The chance is when the enemy makes their move.

name: Dragon Crush
text:
[Cast Cost] Pay 2 gauge.

Destroy an item or spell on the field.
flavor: Spells can only be countered by spells. That's right, the existence of dragons is like a great spell too.

name: Dragon Flame
text: Destroy a monster on the field with 5000 or less power!
flavor: The explosive eternal flames. That is the Dragon's Breath

text:

[Cast Cost] [Pay 3 gauge]

name: Dragon's Seal
text:
[Set] (This card remains on the field)

name: Dragonic Assault
text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 1 gauge]

[Counter] Choose an «Armordragon» on your field, and for this turn, give it critical+1!! You may only cast "Dragonic Assault" once per turn.
flavor: It went through!

name: Dragonic Charge
text: [Counter] Put two cards from the top of your deck into the gauge.
flavor: Dragons possess more energy than any living creature. That's due to the fact they were born to calm the wild chaos of ancient lands, and are the embodiment of nature itself.

name: Dragonic Counter
text:
You may only cast this card if one or more «Armordragon» monsters on your field is being attacked.

[Cast Cost] [Return one of those monsters to your hand & Pay 2 gauge]

[Counter] Destroy a size 2 or less monster on your opponent's field.
flavor: A defensive type of skill, an attack can be deflected away even when sitting. Born from tireless training, a skillful technique.

name: Dragonic Dash
text: Choose a monster on your field, and for this turn, give it [Penetrate]. ([Penetrate]: If this card attacks and destroys your opponent's monster in the center, this card deals damage equal to its critical to your opponent.)
flavor: Save the world, protect the destined youth. Believing in the prophecy, he heads for the new world, Earth.

name: Dragonic Destroy
text:
[Cast Cost] Pay 2 gauge.

Destroy an opponent's monster on the field!
flavor: A dragon's rage burns even the skies.

name: Dragonic Force Field
text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

text:
You may only cast this card if you are being attacked.

flavor: Dragons are powerful alone, and more so if they learn teamwork...!

text:
You may only cast this card if your life is 5 or less.

Drop all your hand cards, and draw three cards! You may only cast "Dragonic Grimoire" once per turn. (You can cast this card even if you have no hand cards to drop!)
flavor: Dragons are powerful alone, and more so if they learn teamwork...!

name: Dragonic Heal
text: Gain 2 life.
flavor: Dragons and man had conflicts in the past, and became rivals as well as allies. Rivalry became respect, and the differences in cultures were studied.

name: Dragonic Medic
text:
You may only cast this card if you have 4 life or less.

You gain 3 life!
flavor: A broken weapon can be repaired later. However, every moment is crucial when it comes to saving lives.

name: Dragonic Paratrooper

You may only cast this card during an attack by your opponent's monster.

name: Dragonic Shoot
text: [Counter] Destroy a power 3000 or less monster on the field.

text:
[Cast Cost] Pay 1 gauge.

[Cast Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

text:
[Set] (This card remains on the field)

text:

text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 1 gauge]

- If there is a "Jackknife "Gold Ritter"" on your field, draw a card, and you gain 3 life.

text:
[Set] (This card remains on the field)

If you do, reveal the top three cards of your deck, and put them into the drop zone. Call up to three cards with "Thunder Knights" in its card name from among them by paying the [Call Cost], and you get another attack phase.

[Set] (This card remains on the field)

You may only cast this card when your «Weapon» deals damage to your opponent.

name: White Dragon Shield
text: [Counter] The next time damage would be dealt to you this turn, it is reduced by 2.

name: Wrath of Dragon
text: [Counter] Choose an «Armordragon» in battle, and for this battle, give it power+6000 and defense+6000!

text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 3 gauge]

[Cast Cost] [Pay 6 gauge]

[Cast Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

Deal 3 damage to your opponent!

text:
[Cast Cost] Pay 4 gauge.

Destroy all size 2 or less monsters on your opponent's field, and deal 2 damage to your opponent!

text:
You may only cast this card during the turn when your «Weapon» dealt damage to your opponent in an attack.

[Cast Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

You gain 2 life and deal 2 damage to your opponent!

text:
You may only cast this card if you have 5 «Dragon Knight» or more in the drop zone.

[Cast Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

Draw three cards. You may only cast "Dragon Cavalry Arts, The Glorious Legacy" once per turn.

text:
[Cast Cost] Pay 4 gauge.

You may only cast this card if you do not have a monster in the center, and you have two «Dragon Knight» and a «Weapon» on your field.

Destroy all monsters and items on your opponent's field, and deal 3 damage to your opponent!!
flavor: Let's set forth together, with the ones you aspire to be...!

name: Dragonic Punisher
text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 4 gauge & Pay 2 life]

You may only cast this card if your opponent has 4 life or less, and you have a size 2 or greater «Armordragon» on the field.

Deal 4 damage to your opponent!!
flavor: Humans and dragons. Future and past. By working together, what can we hope to achieve at the peak of evolution.

name: Gargantua Punisher!!
text:
You may only cast this card if your opponent has 4 life or less, and neither you nor your opponent has monsters on the center.

[Cast Cost] [Pay 4 gauge]

Deal 4 damage to your opponent! This card cannot be nullified, and its damage cannot be reduced.
flavor: The inherited impact sword - the legend of "Mikado" continues!

name: Finisher! Nashijiru Panibushaaaaa!!
text:
You may only cast this card if your opponent has 3 life or less, and neither you nor your opponent has a monster in the center.

[Cast Cost] [Pay 3 gauge & Shout "Nashijirubushaaaa!!"]

Deal 3 damage to your opponent!!
flavor: Nashijirubushaaaaa!!

name: Gospel of the White Dragon Deity
text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 4 gauge]

You may only cast this card when your opponent casts an impact during your opponent's final phase, and if you have six or more «Armordragon» in the drop zone.

[Counter] Nullify that impact, and deal 2 damage to your opponent!
flavor: Your own evil has polluted your mind.

name: Maximum Skill, Breaking Flames
text:
[Cast Cost] [Pay 3 gauge]
You may only cast this card if your life is 5 or less, you have no monster in the center, and your opponent has a monster in the center.
Put the monster from your opponent's center to the left or right, and deal 3 damage to your opponent!!
flavor: None printed.

name: Reckless Angerrrr!!
text:
[Cast Cost] Pay 4 gauge.

You may only cast this card if your opponent has 4 life or less, and you do not have a monster in the center.

[Stand] one of your «Weapon», and for this turn, give it critical+2, then attack with that «Weapon». The attack cannot be nullified.
flavor: Resist. Show me your fury. If not, you shall be devoured.

name: Roaring Slash!! Gargantua Punisher!!
text:
You may only cast this card if your opponent has 5 life or less, and neither you nor your opponent has a monster in the center.

[Cast Cost] [Pay 5 gauge]

Deal 5 damage to the opponent!! This card cannot be nullified and the damage cannot be reduced.
flavor: ROARING SLASH!!!

name: Boomerang Dragon
text: At the end of the battle of this card, return this card to your hand!
flavor: See you! Let's meet again on the next turn!

name: Missile Bunker Dragon
text:
"Missile launch!" At the end of the battle of this card, put this card on the bottom of your deck, and put the top card of your deck into your gauge.

[Penetrate]
flavor: Use the "Dragon Return System" now!

name: Tomahawk Dragon
text:
[Call Cost] [Pay 1 gauge]

At the end of the battle of this card, return this card to your hand!
flavor: They battle using the techniques of their ancestors to survive.

name: Anger Fist Dragon
text: When this card enters the field, for that turn, this card gets power+2000!
flavor: None printed.

name: Bear-Trap Fang Dragon
flavor: Some Armordragons can only be seen as a joke to humans.

name: Blade Chakram Dragon
flavor: The seasoned user seems to waltz right into the battlefield.

name: Blade Wing Dragon
text: [Move] (At the beginning of each player's attack phase, if this card is on the field, you may move this card to an open monster area.)
flavor: Aerial combat. It's not about dominating area, but your opponent's space.

name: Bloody Card Dragon
text:
[Call Cost] Pay 1 gauge.

When this card enters the field, you may choose a card from your gauge and put it into your hand.
flavor: None printed.

name: Blue Sky Knights, Bonblade Dragon
text:
[Call Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]

"Water Crystal Explosion" When this card enters the field, destroy a size 1 or less monster on your opponent's field, and you gain 1 life!
flavor: I don't think there's anything else to do after this!

name: Blue Sky Knights, Deomedia Dragon
flavor: Blue Sky Knights. Originally taking on missions to investigate the strength of the enemy, but sometimes they just destroy all foes while scouting.

name: Blue Sky Knights, Iron Wing Dragon
flavor: The Blue Sky Knights have an oath with the wind elements. Because of that, they are able to fly even when donned with heavy weaponry.

name: Blue Sky Knights, Seeker Penguin Dragon
text: All monsters on your opponent's field cannot [Move].
flavor: A scout's mission is to Know the unknown.

name: Blue Sky Knights, Slenje Dragon
text: When this card enters the field, if you do not have a monster in the center, you gain 1 life.
flavor: It's alright to leave the center empty. It is so that we can provide you with supplies.

name: Bronze Shield Dragon
flavor: That giant shield protects allies from projectiles, so the troops can advance.

name: Bucket Arm Dragon
text: When this card enters the field, you may choose up to two cards from your opponent's drop zone, and put them on the bottom of your opponent's deck in any order. (Advice! Use this to foil combos which require a number of certain cards in the drop zone!)
flavor: The original method of using it is long forgotten.

name: Burning Lance Dragon
text: [Call Cost] [Pay 2 gauge]
flavor: Humans and dragons have spent a long time working on the strategies with flames.

name: Center Sword Dragon
text: If this card is on the center, it gets power+2000 and defense+2000!
flavor: Let us all march together!

name: Death Rattle Dragon
text: All of your other «Armordragon» monsters get power+1000 and defense+1000!
flavor: I can hear the rattle of our allies. Looks like we have the advantage.

name: Diamond Shield Dragon
text: [Call Cost] [Pay 1 gauge]
flavor: Although it boasts a formidable toughness, the girls feel that it's a waste.

name: Dirge Drill Dragon
text: [Penetrate] (If this card attacks and destroys your opponent's monster in the center, this card deals damage equal to its critical to your opponent.)

name: Disturb Hand Dragon
text: Your opponent cannot draw cards by the effect of cards.
flavor: I won't let you!!

name: Double Sword Dragon
flavor: Handling two swords requires special skills. However, you won't know if you don't give it a try.

name: Dragon Knight, Crazy Horse
flavor: Do not hold on to the hand of others. If you always follow what others say, your soul heads to death.

name: Dragon Knight, El Quixote
text: "Glorious Charge" When this card deals damage to your opponent, put the top card of your deck into the gauge.
flavor: You do not simply become. It simply depends on if you are prepared for what is to come.

name: Dragon Knight, Hannibal

Choose and use one of the following two.

- Put two souls from a card on your field into your drop zone. If you do, destroy a card on the field, and put this card into the soul of a «Shadow Shade» on your field.

If one card from among them is a card of the declared card type, for this turn, this card gets [Quadruple Attack]. Then, if both cards from among them are cards of the declared card type, nullify the abilities of all cards on your opponent's field, and destroy them. You may only use this ability once per turn. (You can choose Monster, Spell, Item, Impact, Flag and Impact Monster for card types)
